text_content: Home | Indian Council of Social Science Research - ICSSR Skip to main content Notice Announcement of the Results of Research Projects (Major and Minor) for the year 2025-26 | Call for Applications under “ICSSR Recognized Institutions” Scheme | Extension of nomination submission Deadline for ICSSR National Fellowship | Declaration of Results of the Second Call for Multi-disciplinary Studies on the Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups (PVTGs) of India (2025-26) | Declaration of results of Special Call for organizing Seminars/ Conferences/ Conclaves on GST Reforms and their Socio-Economic Impact | Declaration of Result of Senior Fellowship 2025-26 | Declaration of Result of Postdoctoral Fellowship 2025-26 | 2nd Indo-Swiss Research & Methods Festival, 2-7 February 2026 | Call for Nominations for ICSSR National Fellowships | Important Advisory - Respond Only to Official ICSSR Communications | Visiting hours of ICSSR is 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM | All communication, enquiries, Grant-in-Aid bills, Progress Reports etc. pertaining to any Division of ICSSR must be addressed to the Divisional Head of that particular Division and not to the Chairman or Member Secretary Research Methodology Workshop, 26th February - 2nd March 2026 2nd Indo-Swiss Research & Methods Festival, 2-7 February 2026 The 2nd CAG–ICSSR Colloquium on Public Finance of States on December 15, 2025 26th AASSREC Biennial Conference, New Delhi CAG-ICSSR Colloquium on Audit of the Health Sector and State Finances on November 11, 2025 Hindi Pakhwada 2025 Fellowships Project Grant Grant for Organizing Events Publication Grant International Collaboration Apply for Grants Announcements Results Grievance Portal Welcome to Indian Council of Social Science Research The Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR) is the apex body of the Government of India for research in the social and human sciences. Founded in 1969, ICSSR operates under the aegis of the Ministry of Education, Government of India. ICSSR plays a pivotal role in advancing knowledge and understanding of various social issues and challenges, and providing research-based solutions to policymakers and stakeholders in the development of the nation through initiatives and schemes such as research projects; doctoral, postdoctoral, senior fellowships, and national fellowships; research internships; training and capacity building of early career researchers; publication grants; national and international seminars, conferences and workshops; publication of cutting-edge research; national and international collaboration; promotion of social science and humanities research through research institutes, recognised institutes and regional centres. Documentation centre of ICSSR - National Social Science Documentation Centre (NASSDOC) - provides library and information support services to researchers in social sciences. ICSSR's mission is to shape the agenda of social science research across the nation and contribute to informed policymaking and societal development by promoting research excellence. As part of the bilateral programmes with SNSF, the ICSSR is launching a call for joint proposals in the field of social sciences. 09 January, 2026 India Research Tour 2025 Springer Nature, in collaboration with the Indian Council of Social Science Research, invites you to embark on a journey of discovery, collaboration, and innovation. Together, let’s inspire and elevate research across India — and shape the future of knowledge! 06 October, 2025 Call for Proposals on Indo-German Funding Opportunity for Joint Research Projects in the field of Social Science Research In pursuance of the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) signed between the Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR) and the German Research Foundation (DFG -- Deutsche Forschungsgemeinschaft), Germany proposals are invited for joint Indo-German academic research projects in the field of Social Sciences and Humanities. 12 August, 2024 Jobs | Rules Advertisement Tenders Collegium of ICSSR Photogallery Video e-Office ICSSR Publications More[+] Key Figures 8316 Research Projects Awarded 706 Research Programmes Awarded 13,112 ICSSR Fellowship Awarded 5659 National Conferences/ Seminars funded 1557 International Conferences/ Seminars funded 1367 Training and Capacity Building prog. funded 1897 Publication Grant 2694 Travel grants funded 499 Grant for Data Collection Abroad Data as on March 31, 2025.
